news.headline: Who could England face in last 32 after qualifying for next round?

news.headline: Gakpo asks for privacy after loss of unborn son
news.desc: Noa van der Bij, the partner of Liverpool and Netherlands forward Cody Gakpo, announces the pair have lost their unborn son.

news.headline: We have been treated unfairly by USA - Iran

news.headline: 'No-one could see it coming' - Tuchel defends selection after James injury

news.headline: Scotland's World Cup hopes at 0.07% - these are results they need

news.headline: 'I leave nothing' - the end of 'toxic' Bielsa's Uruguay reign
news.desc: With Uruguay eliminated from the 2026 World Cup, BBC Sport looks at what has gone wrong for them under colourful coach Marcelo Bielsa.

news.headline: Messi to start final Argentina group match on bench
news.desc: World Cup top scorer Lionel Messi will start Argentina's final group match against Jordan on the bench, manager Lionel Scaloni confirms.
